\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{lltpaperstyle}

\begin{document}

\section{Footnote Compatibility}
This sentence uses a normal footnote.\footnote{Normal footnote text.}
This sentence uses an explicit mark.\footnote[7]{Optional mark footnote text.}

\startappendices

\section*{Unnumbered Appendix Note}
This starred section should not require an appendix counter step.

\section[Short Appendix]{Long Appendix Title}
This appendix section should preserve its optional short title.

\finishappendices

\section[Short Main]{Restored Main Section}
This section verifies that the appendix wrapper restored the original section
command, including optional short titles.

\end{document}
